narrative:
Jackson 21 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,261 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
